S

SAFDeletedCount - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.BatchResponse
For DELETESAFFILE command, it stand for Total number of records deleted.
SAFFailedCount - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.BatchResponse
Number of failed records during the uploading process
SAFFailedTotal - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.BatchResponse
Number of total records in failed Database after the uploading process.
SAFIndicator - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.BatchRequest
Store and forward upload type indicator
SAFIndicator - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ReportRequest
Store and forward transaction report indicator.
SAFMode - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
Store and forward mode indicator.
SAFMode - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageResponse
Store and forward mode indicator
SAFTotalAmount - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.BatchResponse
Total amount for all the new SAF records (exclude old records.
SAFTotalCount - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.BatchResponse
For SAFUPLOAD command, it stand for Total number of new SAF records (exclude old records).
SAFUploadedAmount - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.BatchResponse
Amount of successful approved uploaded records.
SAFUploadedCount - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.BatchResponse
Number of successful approved uploaded records.
SAFUploadMode - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
SAF Uploading mode.

Please refer to Google Service Type Bitmap Definition
Default value is “1000000000000000”

FileName of captured signature.
SigFileName - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentResponse

Whether to acquire the signature data in payment response.
SignatureBox - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
Signature Box
SignatureCaptureFlag - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.TransactionBehavior
The ECR supports signature printing and terminal supports signature capture, if this field exists, the value as below:
SignatureFlag - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageResponse
Indicate that if signature is needed.
SignatureStatus - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.entity.TransInfo
The signature status.
SignatureUploadFlag - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.TransactionBehavior
Whether to upload the signature.
SignData - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentResponse
Signature data captured by terminal for current
SignStatus - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageResponse
1: Done the signature.
SigSavePath - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
The signature file path.

State - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest.GoogleSmartTapPushService.ServiceUsage

StatementDescriptor - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.HostGateWay
Allows merchants to add a dynamic suffix value to a shortened version of the merchant DBA (Doing Business As) name for each transaction.
StationId - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.HostGateWay
Station number/LaneID, StationID, RegisterID
StatusReportFlag - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.TransactionBehavior
Whether to report status back.
StayDuration - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.LodgingInfo.RoomRates
Actual or Estimated days the guest is staying in the room.

SUCC - Static variable in class com.pax.poslink.ProcessTransResult
 
SummaryCommodityCode - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.CommercialCard
An international description code of the overall goods or services being supplied.
The acquirer bank or processor should provide the merchant an updated listing of currently defined codes.
SurchargeAmt - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
Merchant surcharge fee for DEBIT/EBT, $$$$$$$CC.
SurchargeAmt - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest
The merchant surcharge fee, $$$$$$$CC.
